description.zh: 專為成年伴侶設計，溫柔談身體界線、親密邀請、性需求與同意安全。
description.en: For adult partners to talk gently about body boundaries, intimacy invitations, sexual needs, consent, and safety.

endMessage.zh: 謝謝你們把親密談得更清楚，也把彼此照顧得更溫柔。
endMessage.en: Thank you for making intimacy clearer, kinder, and safer for both of you.

text.zh: 佔位：說說一種讓你感到安全的親密邀請方式。
text.en: Placeholder: Share one intimate invitation that helps you feel safe.
text.th: Placeholder: Share one intimate invitation that helps you feel safe.
text.ja: Placeholder: Share one intimate invitation that helps you feel safe.

text.zh: 佔位：有哪些碰觸需要先被詢問，才會讓你比較安心？
text.en: Placeholder: What kinds of touch feel better when they are asked about first?
text.th: Placeholder: What kinds of touch feel better when they are asked about first?
text.ja: Placeholder: What kinds of touch feel better when they are asked about first?

text.zh: 佔位：你希望我們如何說出今晚適合或不適合親密？
text.en: Placeholder: How would you like us to say whether intimacy feels right tonight?
text.th: Placeholder: How would you like us to say whether intimacy feels right tonight?
text.ja: Placeholder: How would you like us to say whether intimacy feels right tonight?

text.zh: 佔位：哪一句話會讓你在親密前更放鬆？
text.en: Placeholder: What sentence would help you relax before intimacy?
text.th: Placeholder: What sentence would help you relax before intimacy?
text.ja: Placeholder: What sentence would help you relax before intimacy?

text.zh: 佔位：你喜歡我們用什麼節奏靠近彼此？
text.en: Placeholder: What pace do you like when we move closer physically?
text.th: Placeholder: What pace do you like when we move closer physically?
text.ja: Placeholder: What pace do you like when we move closer physically?

text.zh: 佔位：如果想暫停，你希望我怎麼回應你？
text.en: Placeholder: If you want to pause, how would you like me to respond?
text.th: Placeholder: If you want to pause, how would you like me to respond?
text.ja: Placeholder: If you want to pause, how would you like me to respond?

text.zh: 佔位：你最近對身體親密最想被理解的是什麼？
text.en: Placeholder: What do you most want understood about physical intimacy lately?
text.th: Placeholder: What do you most want understood about physical intimacy lately?
text.ja: Placeholder: What do you most want understood about physical intimacy lately?

text.zh: 佔位：哪些身體界線如果被尊重，會讓你更願意靠近？
text.en: Placeholder: Which body boundaries help you feel more open when respected?
text.th: Placeholder: Which body boundaries help you feel more open when respected?
text.ja: Placeholder: Which body boundaries help you feel more open when respected?

text.zh: 佔位：你希望我們怎麼談親密頻率，才不會像壓力？
text.en: Placeholder: How can we talk about intimacy frequency without making it pressure?
text.th: Placeholder: How can we talk about intimacy frequency without making it pressure?
text.ja: Placeholder: How can we talk about intimacy frequency without making it pressure?

text.zh: 佔位：什麼樣的邀請方式會讓你覺得被尊重？
text.en: Placeholder: What kind of invitation helps you feel respected?
text.th: Placeholder: What kind of invitation helps you feel respected?
text.ja: Placeholder: What kind of invitation helps you feel respected?

text.zh: 佔位：你希望我如何確認你的同意，而不破壞氣氛？
text.en: Placeholder: How can I check for your consent without breaking the mood?
text.th: Placeholder: How can I check for your consent without breaking the mood?
text.ja: Placeholder: How can I check for your consent without breaking the mood?

text.zh: 佔位：我們可以用什麼暗號表示想慢一點或停一下？
text.en: Placeholder: What signal could we use to slow down or pause?
text.th: Placeholder: What signal could we use to slow down or pause?
text.ja: Placeholder: What signal could we use to slow down or pause?

text.zh: 佔位：你覺得親密後最需要哪一種安撫或陪伴？
text.en: Placeholder: What reassurance or care do you need most after intimacy?
text.th: Placeholder: What reassurance or care do you need most after intimacy?
text.ja: Placeholder: What reassurance or care do you need most after intimacy?

text.zh: 佔位：有哪些慾望你想慢慢談，但希望先保留拒絕的空間？
text.en: Placeholder: What desires would you like to discuss slowly, with room to say no?
text.th: Placeholder: What desires would you like to discuss slowly, with room to say no?
text.ja: Placeholder: What desires would you like to discuss slowly, with room to say no?

text.zh: 佔位：你如何分辨自己是真的想靠近，而不是只是不想讓對方失望？
text.en: Placeholder: How do you know you truly want closeness, not just avoid disappointing me?
text.th: Placeholder: How do you know you truly want closeness, not just avoid disappointing me?
text.ja: Placeholder: How do you know you truly want closeness, not just avoid disappointing me?

text.zh: 佔位：當我們的親密需求不同時，什麼協商方式最公平？
text.en: Placeholder: When our intimacy needs differ, what negotiation feels fairest?
text.th: Placeholder: When our intimacy needs differ, what negotiation feels fairest?
text.ja: Placeholder: When our intimacy needs differ, what negotiation feels fairest?

text.zh: 佔位：你希望我如何回應你的害羞、猶豫或拒絕？
text.en: Placeholder: How would you like me to respond to your shyness, hesitation, or no?
text.th: Placeholder: How would you like me to respond to your shyness, hesitation, or no?
text.ja: Placeholder: How would you like me to respond to your shyness, hesitation, or no?

text.zh: 佔位：有什麼親密情境需要我們先談清楚界線？
text.en: Placeholder: What intimate situation asks us to clarify boundaries first?
text.th: Placeholder: What intimate situation asks us to clarify boundaries first?
text.ja: Placeholder: What intimate situation asks us to clarify boundaries first?

text.zh: 佔位：你想讓我們在哪些親密時刻更常確認彼此感受？
text.en: Placeholder: During which intimate moments should we check in more often?
text.th: Placeholder: During which intimate moments should we check in more often?
text.ja: Placeholder: During which intimate moments should we check in more often?

text.zh: 佔位：結束這張牌後，你想給彼此一句什麼樣的安全感？
text.en: Placeholder: After this card, what reassurance would you like us to offer each other?
text.th: Placeholder: After this card, what reassurance would you like us to offer each other?
text.ja: Placeholder: After this card, what reassurance would you like us to offer each other?
